hooks.command:
FILE=".claude/CLAUDE.md"; HASH=$(git log -1 --format=%h); if ! grep -qF "$HASH" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then DATE=$(git log -1 --format=%ad --date=short); SUBJECT=$(git log -1 --format=%s); grep -q "^## Recent Commits" "$FILE" || printf "
## Recent Commits

" >> "$FILE"; printf -- "- \`%s\` %s %s
" "$HASH" "$DATE" "$SUBJECT" >> "$FILE"; git add "$FILE"; git commit -m "docs: log commit $HASH in CLAUDE.md" --quiet; git push --quiet; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Logging commit to CLAUDE.md and pushing to GitHub...
